product_overview: LeadFlow AI is an AI-powered CRM and sales automation platform that helps businesses capture, qualify, engage, nurture, and convert leads with less manual effort. It centralizes lead management, conversation tracking, follow-ups, and business context to streamline the full lead lifecycle.
core_goals: Import and manage leads in a centralized system
Track and update lead stage and status across the sales pipeline
Store conversations and surface AI-suggested replies for engagement
Create and complete follow-up tasks to ensure no lead is forgotten
Save business context to support more personalized lead communication
Provide visibility into the full lead journey from creation to conversion

features.name: Lead Management API
features.description: Lets users create, view, update, and filter leads, including changing lead status and stage.
user_flows: GET /api/leads to list all leads -> Receive 200 with a leads array
POST /api/leads with valid first_name, last_name, email, and company -> Receive 201 with created lead -> GET /api/leads/<id> to verify saved lead -> Receive 200 with lead details
PUT /api/leads/<id> with updated lead fields -> Receive 200 with updated lead record
PATCH /api/leads/<id>/status with a valid status value -> Receive 200 with lead status updated -> GET /api/leads/<id> to confirm the new status
PATCH /api/leads/<id>/stage with a valid stage value -> Receive 200 with lead stage updated -> GET /api/leads/<id> to confirm the new stage
GET /api/leads/<id> with a non-existent lead id -> Receive an error response indicating the lead was not found
POST /api/leads with missing required fields -> Receive a validation error response

features.name: Lead Engagement API
features.description: Manages follow-up tasks and conversation threads, including retrieving messages, creating tasks, and recording replies.
user_flows: GET /api/leads/<id>/followups to retrieve follow-up tasks -> Receive 200 with followups array
POST /api/leads/<id>/followups with follow-up details -> Receive 201 with created followup -> GET /api/leads/<id>/followups to confirm the new task appears -> Receive 200 with updated followups array
PATCH /api/leads/followups/<followup_id>/complete to complete an open follow-up -> Receive 200 with completed followup status
GET /api/leads/<id>/messages to retrieve a conversation thread and AI suggested reply -> Receive 200 with messages array and suggested_reply string

POST /api/leads/<id>/messages with a new customer or system message -> Receive 201 with created message -> GET /api/leads/<id>/messages to verify message history and updated suggested reply -> Receive 200 with thread data
GET /api/leads/conversations to retrieve all conversation threads -> Receive 200 with conversations array
PATCH /api/leads/followups/<followup_id>/complete for an invalid followup_id -> Receive an error response indicating the follow-up was not found
GET /api/leads/<id>/messages for a lead with no conversation history -> Receive 200 with an empty messages array and/or no suggested reply

features.name: Business Context API
features.description: Stores and retrieves business profile configuration used to inform AI-assisted lead communication.
user_flows: GET /api/business-context to retrieve the current business context -> Receive 200 with business_context object

POST /api/business-context with valid business profile data -> Receive 200 with saved business_context -> GET /api/business-context to confirm the stored configuration -> Receive 200 with business_context object
POST /api/business-context with incomplete or invalid context fields -> Receive a validation error response
GET /api/business-context when no business context exists yet -> Receive an empty/default response or not-found style response depending on implementation

features.name: Lead Management API
features.description: Operations to retrieve, create, update, and change stage/status of leads

endpoints.description: List all leads with optional filters

features.name: Lead Engagement API
features.description: Operations for managing conversations, suggested replies, and follow-up tasks

endpoints.description: Retrieve follow-up tasks for a lead
Create a follow-up task for a lead
Retrieve conversation thread messages and AI suggested replies
Retrieve all conversation threads in system
